name: ATLAS333 — Cognitive Geometry Agent
description: Cognitive geometry agent — maps paradoxes and routes by territory and depth.

extensions.description: Constitutional floor enforcement (F1-F13). Every action routed through arifOS kernel for floor evaluation before execution.

skills.name: Geometric Classification
skills.description: Classify a query into territory (ORIENT/REASON/ACT/VERIFY/GROW) × geometry (EXPLORE/ENGINEER/AUDIT/CRISIS/INTEGRATE) × depth (L0-L6). Returns GPV with paradox_axes.
examples: What type of problem is this?

skills.name: Paradox Axis Resolution
skills.description: Given a GPV or paradox axis IDs, return the matching philosophical quotes, triggered floors, and zone activations from the 35-paradox map (1-35).
examples: What floors does Zone II activate?
Resolve paradox axes for this GPV

skills.name: Cognitive Geometry Query
skills.description: Return the current cognitive geometry map — which territories, geometries, and depths are defined, and how they map to organs and stages.
examples: Show me the full geometry map

skills.name: Contour Addition
skills.description: Add a new connection to the atlas: a GPV pattern, a paradox→quote link, a zone→floor mapping. This is how the evergreen map grows. One contour per call.
examples: Add a new pattern to PARADOX_GPV_MAP

governance.evergreen_policy: Contour, don't excavate. Seal each contour. Never finish.
